title: Pereyil Jagadeeswarar Temple
tagline: Pereyil Jagadeeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Pereyil Jagadeeswarar Temple(பேரெயில் ஜகதீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Tirukollampudur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Pereyil Jagadeeswarar Temple(பேரெயில் ஜகதீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Tirukollampudur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Vilvaranyeswarar. His consort, Parvati, is known as Jagan Nayaki. The historical name of the place is Pereyil.

topPlaces.name: Sellur
topPlaces.description: Sellur is a revenue village in the Thirunallar taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated to the west of Thirunallar.

topPlaces.name: Abivirutheeswaram
topPlaces.description: Abivirutheeswaram is a village in the Kudavasal taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Manjakkudi
topPlaces.description: Manjakkudi is a village on the banks of Kaveri river in Tiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It comes under the Kudavasal Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Koneswarar Temple, Kudavasal
topPlaces.description: Koneswarar Temple (Tamil: குடவாசல் கோணேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple in the town of Kudavasal in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Apatsahayesvarar Temple, Alangudi
topPlaces.description: Apatsahayesvarar Temple, Alangudi or Guru Sthalam or Tiru Irum Poolai is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in the village of Alangudi, in the Valangaiman taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Apathsahyesvarar, and is represented by the lingam.

topPlaces.name: Koradacheri
topPlaces.description: Koradacheri is a panchayat town in Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It lies between the rivers Vettar and Vennar flowing at a distance of about 1.5 km.

topPlaces.name: Vennavasal
topPlaces.description: Vennavasal is a village located in the Koradacheri block of the Thiruvarur District on the banks of Vennaaru river in the south Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Elangarkudi
topPlaces.description: Elangarkudi is a village near Koradacheri in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu. There are two temples in the village.

items.note: Sellur is a revenue village in the Thirunallar taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated to the west of Thirunallar.

Apatsahayesvarar Temple, Alangudi or Guru Sthalam or Tiru Irum Poolai is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in the village of Alangudi, in the Valangaiman taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Apathsahyesvarar, and is represented by the lingam.
Koradacheri is a panchayat town in Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It lies between the rivers Vettar and Vennar flowing at a distance of about 1.5 km.
Vennavasal is a village located in the Koradacheri block of the Thiruvarur District on the banks of Vennaaru river in the south Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Elangarkudi is a village near Koradacheri in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu. There are two temples in the village.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pereyil Jagadeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pereyil Jagadeeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pereyil Jagadeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (82 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (84 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pereyil Jagadeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pereyil Jagadeeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pereyil Jagadeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Pereyil Jagadeeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pereyil Jagadeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sellur, Abivirutheeswaram, Manjakkudi, Koneswarar Temple, Kudavasal, Apatsahayesvarar Temple, Alangudi.
